title: TwinTails
description: A Minecraft mod that adds twintails
body:
# TwinTails
A Minecraft mod that adds twintails. This mod adds several cosmetic "Hair Tie" items, which can be equipped in the helmet armor slot. The recipe is one slimeball in the center of the crafting grid and 4 colored wool in a plus shape around it.

# Recipes
![img](http://i.imgur.com/1cC8LSf.gif)

# Other
The original author of this mod is Hea5veN, I updated it to version 1.11/1.12/1.20/1.21, original post project(version 1.7~1.10): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twintails
